title: Fix embedding truncation for chunks longer than 512 characters

acceptanceCriteria.text: Chunks longer than 512 chars are no longer truncated before embedding
Approach chosen: either chunk-and-multi-embed or embed summary field
Test: semantic search finds content that exists only after character 512
Test: embedding generation doesn't significantly slow down for long content
Run CodeRabbit review - must pass (or create BUG if unfixable)
Commit: feat: US-003 fix embedding truncation for long chunks
